name: DrawingArea

aliases.name: DrawingArea
aliases.type: { annotations : AnnotationSet, viewer : SvgViewer, currentTool : Tool }

values.name: changeBgImage
values.comment: Change the background image.

values.name: createAnnotation
values.comment: Create new annotation.

values.name: default
values.comment: The default drawing area, no annotation and no tool.

values.name: exportAnnotations
values.comment: Export the complete model of the annotation set to a JS object

values.name: exportSelectionsPaths
values.comment: Export only the seletions paths to a JS object

values.name: fitImage
values.comment: Adapt the view so that the image fit a certain percentage of the view.

values.name: getAnnotation
values.comment: Returns an annotation with its id if it exists.

values.name: hasSelection
values.comment: Indicates if the drawing area has at least one selection

values.name: nbAnnotations
values.comment: Return the number of annotations in the annotation set.

values.name: removeAnnotation
values.comment: Remove annotation having a certain id.

values.name: selectAnnotationTag
values.comment: Create a <select> tag for the annotations.

values.name: selectToolTag
values.comment: Create a <select> tag for the tools.

values.name: setAnnotation
values.comment: Set an annotation of the drawing area.

values.name: updateAnnotation
values.comment: Update the current annotation.
values.type: (Annotation -> Annotation) -> Maybe ( Int, Annotation ) -> DrawingArea -> ( Maybe ( Int, Annotation ), DrawingArea )

values.name: updateArea
values.comment: Update the drawing area depending on the mouse event.
values.type: ( Float, Float ) -> Pointer -> Maybe ( Int, Annotation ) -> DrawingArea -> ( Maybe ( Int, Annotation ), DrawingArea )

values.name: useTool

values.name: view
values.comment: View the svg tag representing the DrawingArea model

values.name: viewAnnotation
values.comment: View the given annotation.
values.type: List (Attribute msg) -> Maybe Annotation -> DrawingArea -> Svg msg

values.name: zoomIn
values.comment: Zoom in the view.

values.name: zoomOut
values.comment: Zoom out the view.

name: SvgViewer

aliases.name: Option
aliases.comment: One option (a string giving its name).

aliases.name: SvgViewer
aliases.comment: An Svg viewer has a background image and some geometric properties.
aliases.type: { bgImage : Maybe Image, options : OptionSet, size : ( Float, Float ), origin : ( Float, Float ), zoom : Float }

values.name: changeBgImage
values.comment: Change the background image.

values.name: changeOption
values.comment: Change an option of the viewer.

values.name: changeZoom
values.comment: Change and zoom value.

values.name: changeZoomCentered
values.comment: Change and zoom value while keeping the current center.

values.name: currentCenter
values.comment: Get the current center of the viewer.

values.name: default
values.comment: The default Svg viewer for a drawing area.

values.name: defaultOptions
values.comment: The default options.

values.name: fitImage
values.comment: Fit the view so that the image takes a certain percentage of its max viewable size.

values.name: move
values.comment: Move the viewer.

values.name: optionValue
values.comment: Get the value of an option.

values.name: reCenter
values.comment: Recenter the viewer at a given point.

values.name: resize
values.comment: Resize the viewer.

values.name: transformPos
values.comment: Transform coordinates of a position.

values.name: transformSize
values.comment: Transform coordinates of a size.

values.name: view
values.comment: View the svg tag representing the DrawingArea model
values.type: List (Attribute msg) -> AnnotationSet -> SvgViewer -> Svg msg

values.name: zoomIn
values.comment: Zoom in (x2).

values.name: zoomOut
values.comment: Zoom out (x0.5).

name: AnnotationSet

aliases.name: AnnotationSet
aliases.comment: An annotation set is basically an array of annotations.

values.name: hasSelection
values.comment: Indicates if the annotation set has at least one selection.

values.name: object
values.comment: JavaScript object representing an annotation set.

values.name: pathsObject
values.comment: Simplified JavaScript object representing the selection paths of the annotation set.

values.name: remove
values.comment: Remove the annotation at the given id from the set.

values.name: selectTag
values.comment:
Create a <select> tag with an <option> tag for each annotation.
currentId is the id of the currently selected option.

type Msg
    = SelectAnnotation (Int, Annotation)

currentAnnotation =
    Maybe.withDefault Ann.default <| Array.get currentId set

html =
    H.div
        []
        (selectTag set (currentId, currentAnnotation) SelectAnnotation)
values.type: AnnotationSet -> Maybe ( Int, Annotation ) -> (Maybe ( Int, Annotation ) -> msg) -> Html msg

values.name: viewAllSelections
values.comment: View of the SVG representation of all the annotations in the set.

name: Pointer
comment:
This module aims at giving helper functions to deal with pointer events.

@docs Event, Pointer, offset, movement, attributes, askTime

unions.name: Event
unions.comment: Events generated by a pointer device.

aliases.name: Pointer
aliases.type: { event : Event, offsetX : Float, offsetY : Float, movementX : Float, movementY : Float }

values.name: askTime
values.comment: Use a message maker (tagger) to create a command message giving Time.now.

values.name: attributes
values.comment: Returns a list of attribute messages with useful mouse events listeners.
values.type: (Pointer -> msg) -> Tool -> Maybe Pointer -> List (Attribute msg)

values.name: movement
values.comment: Returns (movementX, movementY).

values.name: offset
values.comment: Returns (offsetX, offsetY).

name: Annotation

unions.name: Event
unions.comment: Event marking the starting of a new selection or just the continuation of the current one.

unions.name: Selection
unions.comment: What can be the selection of an annotation.

aliases.name: Annotation
aliases.comment: An annotation is composed of a selection and has a label.

values.name: default
values.comment: Default empty annotation.

values.name: hasSelection
values.comment: Indicates if the annotation has a selection.

values.name: object
values.comment: Return JS object representing the annotation.

values.name: pathObject
values.comment: Return JS object simplified version of the path only.

values.name: selectionView
values.comment: Svg view representing the annotation.

values.name: setLabel
values.comment: Set the label of the annotation.

values.name: setStartTime
values.comment: Set the start time of the annotation.

values.name: setStopTime
values.comment: Set the stop time of the annotation.

values.name: updateSelection
values.comment:
Update the selection of the annotation depending on the type of event,
the corner positions and the current tool.
values.type: Event -> ( Int, Int ) -> ( Int, Int ) -> Tool -> Annotation -> Annotation

name: Tools
comment:
Tools aims at providing helper functions related to the drawing area tools.

@docs Tool, selectTag

unions.name: Tool
unions.comment: The type of tool that can be used to draw selections.

values.name: selectTag
values.comment: An html <select> tag enabling the choice of a tool.
